title: It’s not just Florida and Texas that threaten NYC’s sputtering tax base - here's the next big worry
description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s plan to tax his way out of the Big Apple’s self-imposed fiscal crisis is facing a fresh and little-discussed threat, according to well-placed financiers – and it’s coming from artificial intelligence.
content:

title: Worried about AI? LinkedIn CEO reveals 5 skills artificial intelligence won’t replace
description: To stay relevant in this changing world, LinkedIn CEO highlights five key skills that AI cannot easily replicate.
content: As artificial intelligence is becoming an important part of people’s daily workflow, many young professionals are worried about their future. However, Ryan Roslansky, the CEO of LinkedIn, believes that AI won’t replace humans completely. Instead, it ... [2410 chars]

title: Tech layoffs: Is AI replacing jobs or are companies fixing overhiring?
description: Job cuts have been reported across tech companies, showing that the trend is not limited to a single type of company. The trend has raised a key question. Are companies correcting overhiring from the past, or is artificial intelligence starting to reduce the need for certain roles?
content:
Layoffs in India’s technology sector are once again in focus, with job cuts being reported across global tech firms, IT services companies and startups.

title: Economists Are Drawing Stronger Connections Between A.I. and Jobs
description: Artificial intelligence hasn’t disrupted the labor market, economists say, but they are increasingly convinced that it will — and that policymakers are unprepared.
content: Among tech evangelists in Silicon Valley, it has become conventional wisdom that artificial intelligence will rapidly reshape the labor market, for better or worse. Economists, however, have often discussed A.I.’s impact with a skepticism bordering o... [1947 chars]

title: Rethinking Talent and AI in HR: Insights from SRIF HR Summit 2026
description: Mumbai (Maharashtra) [India], April 3: Over 200+ HR professionals, CXOs, and business leaders gathered on March 28 for the SRIF HR Summit 2026 at Vijay Patil School of Management, Nerul, Navi Mumbai -- a full-day forum on the future of hiring, workforce strategy, and the governance of artificial intelligence in HR.

title: William Shatner addresses cancer hoax: ‘This is the downside of AI’
description: The 95-year old called out a Facebook group he claims is using artificial intelligence to create ‘horrible fake news stories’ about him.
content:
Star Trek actor William Shatner says fake stories claiming he has stage four brain cancer are not true, and warned that artificial intelligence (AI) “can be used as a weapon in the wrong hands”.
